questions.question: What is the goal of POS tagging?
options: Assign a grammatical category (noun, verb, etc.) to each token
questions.explanation: POS tagging labels each token with its part of speech.
questions.question_zh: POS tagging 的目标是什么？
options_zh: 给每个 token 分配语法范畴（名词、动词等）
questions.explanation_zh: POS tagging 给每个 token 标注词性。

questions.question: Which tagset is the default for cross-lingual work?
questions.explanation: Universal Dependencies provides a coarser, language-agnostic 17-tag set.
questions.question_zh: 跨语言工作中默认使用哪个 tagset？
questions.explanation_zh: Universal Dependencies 提供更粗、与语言无关的 17 个 tag 集合。

questions.question: What does a bigram HMM POS tagger model?
options: P(tag | previous tag) transitions plus P(word | tag) emissions, decoded with Viterbi
questions.explanation: Bigram HMM uses tag transitions and word emissions; Viterbi finds the highest-probability sequence.
questions.question_zh: bigram HMM POS tagger 建模的是什么？
options_zh: P(tag | previous tag) 转移加 P(word | tag) 发射，用 Viterbi 解码
questions.explanation_zh: bigram HMM 用 tag 转移和词发射；Viterbi 找最高概率序列。

questions.question: What does the Viterbi algorithm compute for an HMM tagger?
options: The single highest-probability tag sequence via dynamic programming over the tag lattice
The marginal probability of each tag
questions.explanation: Viterbi finds the argmax sequence with O(n * |T|^2) dynamic programming.
questions.question_zh: 对 HMM tagger，Viterbi 算法计算的是什么？
options_zh: 在 tag 网格上用动态规划得到唯一最高概率的 tag 序列
每个 tag 的边缘概率
questions.explanation_zh: Viterbi 在 O(n * |T|^2) 动态规划下找 argmax 序列。

questions.question: What does dependency parsing produce?
options: A tree where each word has one head word and a labeled grammatical relation
A constituency tree of NP/VP/PP labels
questions.explanation: Dependency parses give per-word (head, relation) edges; constituency parses give nested phrase structures.
options_zh: 每个词有一个 head 词和一个有标签的语法关系的树
包含 NP/VP/PP 标签的成分树
questions.explanation_zh: 依存解析给出每个词的 (head, relation) 边；成分解析给出嵌套的短语结构。

questions.question: Why is the accuracy ceiling on PTB POS tagging around 97-98%?
options: Models cannot exceed 98% in any task
Human annotators only agree about 97% of the time, so models above ~98% may be overfitting test data
questions.explanation: Annotator disagreement bounds the achievable accuracy; very high numbers often signal overfitting.
questions.question_zh: 为什么 PTB POS tagging 的精度天花板在 97-98% 左右？
options_zh: 模型在任何任务上都不能超过 98%
人类标注者一致性大约只有 97%，所以模型超过 ~98% 可能在过拟合测试集
questions.explanation_zh: 标注分歧限制了可达精度；非常高的数字常意味着过拟合。

questions.question: Why does POS tagging still matter in 2026 LLM pipelines?
options: Lemmatization, aspect-based sentiment, query decomposition, structured-output validation, and cross-lingual transfer all still consume POS or dependency parses
questions.explanation: POS and dependency parses feed many structured downstream tasks even when LLMs generate the prose.
questions.question_zh: 在 2026 年 LLM 流水线中，POS tagging 为什么仍重要？
options_zh: lemmatization、aspect-based 情感、查询分解、结构化输出验证和跨语言迁移仍消费 POS 或依存解析
questions.explanation_zh: POS 与依存解析为很多结构化下游任务提供输入，即使 LLM 写最终文本。

questions.question: Which library should you reach for in most production POS / parse tasks?
options: spaCy (or stanza/trankit for top accuracy or wider language coverage)
questions.explanation: spaCy ships fast production-grade POS + dependency parsers; stanza/trankit cover broader languages.
questions.question_zh: 在生产 POS / parse 任务中应优先选哪个库？
options_zh: spaCy（或 stanza/trankit 以获得更高准确率或更广语言覆盖）
questions.explanation_zh: spaCy 提供生产级 POS + 依存解析；stanza/trankit 覆盖更广语言。
